name: N-3 node detectors: five detectors (boundary-schema, console-in-src, fetch-timeout, naked-throw, supply-chain) ship per §8 N-3
command: n=0; for d in boundary-schema console-in-src fetch-timeout naked-throw supply-chain; do [ -s "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" ] && n=$((n+1)); done; [ "$n" -eq 5 ] && echo "five_present=$n" 1>&2
